title: JavaFX Effects
summary: JavaFX effects are graphical effects you can apply to a JavaFX Node - for instance blur, drop shadow, reflection etc. This JavaFX Effects introduction guides you through the basics of how to apply effects in your JavaFX applications.
content: JavaFX effects are graphical effects you can apply to a JavaFX Node - for instance blur, drop shadow, reflection etc. This JavaFX Effects introduction guides you through the basics of how to apply effects in your JavaFX applications.
